summary: A Fox News broadcast segment with DHS spokeswoman Tricia McLaughlin in a split-screen, accompanied by file footage of Harvard pro-Palestinian campus protests, with signs reading 'FROM THE RIVER TO THE SEA'. It is a recorded TV news clip about holding Harvard accountable, with chyrons and date-stamped B-roll, and no music. Chyrons read 'Tricia McLaughlin - DHS ASST SEC FOR PUBLIC AFFAIRS' and 'HARVARD COMMENCEMENT SPEAKER SLAMS TRUMP ADMIN'; a protest sign reads 'FROM THE RIVER TO THE SEA PALESTINE WILL BE FREE'; a FOX NEWS bug is present.
notable_text: Chyrons: 'Tricia McLaughlin - DHS ASST SEC FOR PUBLIC AFFAIRS'; 'HARVARD COMMENCEMENT SPEAKER SLAMS TRUMP ADMIN'; protest sign 'FROM THE RIVER TO THE SEA PALESTINE WILL BE FREE'; FOX NEWS bug.
